name: scratchtml
description: Review, share and discuss Claude Code plans on scratchtml. Plans are uploaded for inline review before exiting plan mode; revisions carry a changes-from-review section; share/get/list commands included.

plan_review.title: Review plans on scratchtml before exiting plan mode

auto_open.title: Open uploaded plans in the browser automatically (local sessions only)

approve_mode.title: After review: 'ask' shows the built-in approval dialog; 'auto' approves reviewed plans automatically in auto mode
